ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Carottes 60%, houmous 40% (pois chiches (pois chiches 18%, eau, sel), huile de tournesol, pâte de graines de sésame 4%, jus de citron, ail, sel, cumin, acidifiants : acide citrique - acide lactique, conservateur : sorbate de potassium).
